name: Aquarock (water park, Cala'n Bosch)
description: The big water park of the west, next to Cala'n Bosch: the island's only wave pool, slides for every age and a children's area for the youngest. The refreshing day out par excellence with children.

highlights: swim in the only wave pool in Menorca
slides for older children and a safe splash zone for the little ones
a full day with a restaurant, sun loungers and go-karting; tickets cheaper online
